productOptionsHtml:

Catalog highlights

  • Bag & luggage tag made of durable, soft and flexible Sof-Touch™ Original vinyl
  • Wide variety of stock product (and strap) colors are shown in the Product Details tab above
  • Stock insert ID card included and contains lines for name, address, city/state/zip code and phone number designations - great for travel
  • Frequent use on luggage, book bag, gym bag, band bag, or sport duffel generates thousands of ad impressions over long periods
  • Luggage tag is compliant with federal product safety regulations

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Bag & Luggage Tag - Business Card Insert - Spot Color. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 5100 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 7 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 250 units (per catalog line).
